summary: Completed comprehensive END-TO-END BACKEND TESTING for Garment ERP v8.0 Phase 7. Validated all Smart Import features (Tier 1-3), dashboard APIs, and core functionality. Backend is 96.7% functional with one critical RBAC security issue identified in Smart Import commit endpoint.

critical_bugs.issue: RBAC bypass allows non-admin users to commit Smart Import operations
critical_bugs.impact: Security vulnerability - vendor/buyer users can perform admin-only import operations
critical_bugs.root_cause: check_role() function in auth.py line 82 incorrectly grants access when user has any permissions
critical_bugs.details: The condition 'if not perm_key and perms: return True' allows users with any permissions to bypass role-based restrictions

passed_tests: Auth: Admin login (admin@garment.com) - superadmin role with token
Auth: Vendor login (vendor.vts@garment.com) - vendor role with 6 permissions
Auth: Buyer login (buyer.ptabc@garment.com) - buyer role with 3 permissions
Smart Import Tier 1: CSV Upload - session management working
Smart Import Tier 1: File Analysis - detected 11 headers, 3 rows with mapping suggestions
Smart Import Tier 1: Preview with Auto-create Detection - detected vendor/buyer/product auto-creates
Smart Import Tier 1: Commit Import - created 2 POs successfully with auto-created entities
Smart Import Non-AI Mode: Products Analysis - fuzzy matching without LLM works
Smart Import Tier 2: Image Upload - PNG image processing working
Smart Import Tier 2: OCR Extraction - LLM vision extracted 1 row from synthetic invoice
Smart Import Tier 3: PDF Upload - PDF file processing working
Smart Import Tier 3: PDF Extraction (Non-AI) - text-only extraction found 2 rows
Smart Import Data Type: Products - headers and mapping working
Smart Import Data Type: Accessories - headers and mapping working
Smart Import Data Type: Vendors - headers and mapping working
Smart Import Data Type: Buyers - headers and mapping working
Smart Import: Get Presets - preset management API accessible
Smart Import: Create Preset - preset creation with mapping successful
Smart Import: Update Preset - preset modification working
Smart Import: Delete Preset - preset deletion working
Auto-create Flow: Detection - missing entities correctly flagged as 'new' in preview
Admin Dashboard API - comprehensive dashboard with 40+ metrics returned
Vendor Dashboard API - all 10 expected fields present (activeJobs, completedJobs, etc.)
Buyer Dashboard API - all 9 expected fields present (totalPOs, activePOs, progressPct, etc.)
Core Endpoint: /products - returned 2 items, no regression
Core Endpoint: /accessories - accessible, no regression
Core Endpoint: /garments - returned 4 items, no regression
Core Endpoint: /buyers - returned 3 items, no regression
Core Endpoint: /production-pos - returned 3 items, no regression
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix RBAC security vulnerability in Smart Import commit endpoint. The check_role() function in auth.py line 82 incorrectly allows non-admin users to bypass role restrictions. Change the logic to only grant access based on explicit role membership, not on having any permissions. This affects all endpoints using check_role() without a specific permission key.

success_percentage.backend: 96.7% (29/30 tests passed - one critical RBAC security issue)
